arg.name: hostname
arg.description: Vicon server hostname or IP address

arg.name: world_frame
arg.description: World frame for the tf2 transformations

arg.name: vicon_frame
arg.description: Vicon frame for the tf2 transformations

arg.name: map_xyz
arg.description: XYZ translation for coordinate frame mapping

arg.name: map_rpy
arg.description: RPY rotation for coordinate frame mapping

arg.name: map_rpy_in_degrees
arg.description: Whether RPY values are in degrees (true) or radians (false)
